description: (web + core) Non-admin users cannot create/edit/delete/activate Investigation LLM profiles (UI disabled/absent and API 403 or equivalent).

checks.evidence: canManage = usePermission(PERMISSION.MANAGE_SETTINGS); create button, form, and edit/delete/activate controls wrapped in {canManage && (...)}; handleSubmit/handleActivate/handleDelete early-return if (!canManage); non-admin sees t('adminOnly')
admin ROLE_PERMISSIONS includes MANAGE_SETTINGS; member has VIEW_SETTINGS only (no MANAGE_SETTINGS)
POST create, PATCH, DELETE, activate use withAuth(..., { adminOnly: true }); GET has no adminOnly; withAuth returns 403 Admin access required. when role !== admin
POST /, POST /:id/activate, PATCH /:id, DELETE /:id wrap requireRole('admin'); GET / is authenticated-tenant list only; requireRole throws ForbiddenError with statusCode 403
BFF tests assert member POST/PATCH/DELETE/activate → 403 without Core call and member GET allowed; UI source audit for canManage gates; Core route source asserts requireRole('admin') on mutate

notes: Independent QA grep/static audit only (feature_list observation_method=grep). No server/browser started. UI + BFF + Core RBAC already satisfy AC-016.
